title: Sovereign Procurement Trust Room
oneLine: A sponsor needs to trust an AI workflow vendor; GoalOS converts the procurement, security, compliance, and implementation evidence into a proof-backed Trust Room, coordinated with AGIALPHA and improved through RSI.

contractFlow.function: Creates the signed institutional commitment: objective, constraints, success metrics, risk class, allowed evidence, and rollback expectation.
contractFlow.whyItMatters: GoalOS commits the procurement mission without exposing private buyer evidence.

contractFlow.function: Commits the run plan: work packages, builders, reviewers, artifacts, tools, deadlines, and evidence roots.
contractFlow.whyItMatters: The workflow becomes accountable before work begins.

contractFlow.function: Posts the proof mission with AGIALPHA reward and public-safe mission metadata.
contractFlow.whyItMatters: Sponsor demand becomes a visible proof job.

contractFlow.function: Builder claims the mission with an AGIALPHA bond.
contractFlow.whyItMatters: Reduces no-shows and gives the sponsor a credible commitment.

contractFlow.function: Builder submits proof hashes, public-safe proof note, evidence docket root, and proof-card candidate.
contractFlow.whyItMatters: Private evidence stays off-chain; the public proof trail is anchored.

contractFlow.function: Reviewer bonds AGIALPHA and validates or rejects the proof under a rubric.
contractFlow.whyItMatters: Review becomes accountable, not just an opinion.

contractFlow.function: Registers the approved public Proof Card hash and URI.
contractFlow.whyItMatters: Creates a shareable trust asset for sponsors, buyers, and future builders.

contractFlow.function: Issues a non-transferable credential to the builder and optionally reviewer.
Updates reputation based on approved proof, review quality, and challenge history.
contractFlow.whyItMatters: Future routing improves through earned trust.

contractFlow.function: Registers the Evidence Docket root and public/private proof boundary.
contractFlow.whyItMatters: Makes the claim auditable without exposing confidential evidence.

contractFlow.function: Issues a Selection Certificate for artifacts that may influence future work.
contractFlow.whyItMatters: RSI becomes controlled propagation, not blind self-modification.

contractFlow.function: Records the accepted artifacts, credentials, reputation, and upgrade lineage.
contractFlow.whyItMatters: The network remembers what proved useful.

rsiLoop.meaning: Procurement cycles repeatedly stall on the same evidence gaps: security questionnaire, privacy proof, support workflow, claim boundary, rollback plan.
Builders create reusable artifacts: Trust Room index, evidence checklist, answer library, security claim map, RFP response templates, review rubric.
Reviewer validates before/after evidence, checks public claims, confirms private evidence boundaries, and signs an attestation.
Selection Gate promotes only artifacts that are evidence-backed, scope-limited, reversible, and useful for future runs.
Future procurement missions route through the accepted artifacts, reducing duplicated work and improving consistency.
If evidence becomes stale, challenged, or unsafe, the artifact is paused, replaced, or rolled back with a visible receipt.

proofMissions.goal: Create a buyer-safe index of security, privacy, governance, product, and support evidence.
proofMissions.artifact: Evidence Docket root + public-safe Trust Room map

proofMissions.goal: Convert common buyer questions into reviewed response templates and evidence references.
proofMissions.artifact: Question library + answer templates + reviewer rubric

proofMissions.goal: Prevent unsafe public or sales claims before they appear in sponsor-facing material.
Define what happens if a workflow, artifact, or public claim must be paused or reversed.
proofMissions.artifact: Rollback plan + incident response proof note

proofMissions.goal: Record expected operating cost, latency, privacy risk, support burden, and monitoring responsibilities.
